zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Menteith於大約1425年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Murdoch Menteith27歲，母親Margaret Menteith26歲。她和John Napier 3rd of Merchiston至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1507年8月10日在蘇格蘭享年83歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Menteith于大约1425年出生在苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Murdoch Menteith27岁，母亲Margaret Menteith26岁。她和John Napier 3rd of Merchiston至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1507年8月10日在苏格兰享年83岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Menteith was born about 1425, in Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Murdoch Menteith, was 27 and her mother, Margaret Menteith, was 26. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. She died on 10 August 1507, in Scotland, at the age of 83, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Menteith est née environ 1425, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Murdoch Menteith, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Menteith, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. Elle est décédée le 10 août 1507, à Écosse, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Menteith um 1425 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Murdoch Menteith 27 und ihre Mutter Margaret Menteith 26. Sie hatte mit John Napier 3rd of Merchiston mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. August 1507 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Menteith è nata il circa 1425 nel Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Murdoch Menteith, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margaret Menteith, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. Morì il 10 agosto 1507, nel Scotland, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Menteithが約1425年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Murdoch Menteithは27歳，母Margaret Menteithは26歳であった。彼女はJohn Napier 3rd of Merchistonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1507年8月10日にスコットランドで83歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Menteith(이)가 대략 1425년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Murdoch Menteith(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Menteith(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 John Napier 3rd of Merchiston(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 8월 10일 스컷랜드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Murdoch Menteith, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Menteith, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. Ela faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1507, em Scotland, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Menteith родилась около 1425 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Murdoch Menteith было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Menteith, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. Она умерла 10 августа 1507 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Menteith nació aproximadamente 1425, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Murdoch Menteith, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Menteith, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con John Napier 3rd of Merchiston. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1507, en Scotland, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Midlothian, Scotland.
